What We Offer

Our Detailing Packages

01
Full Detail
The complete treatment — deep interior extraction, full exterior decontamination, clay bar, hand wax, and spot-free rinse. Your car leaves looking better than the day you drove it off the lot.
Starting at
$299 / vehicle
02
Premium Wash & Wax
A thorough hand wash, wheel clean, tire dressing, and hand wax application to protect your paint and keep heads turning down every block.
$149 / vehicle
03
Full Interior Detail
Deep vacuum, shampoo of all fabric and carpets, leather conditioning, dashboard and trim detailing, and odor elimination. A fresh cabin that smells as good as it looks.
$229 / vehicle
04
Maintenance Detail
Designed for vehicles that have already received a previous detail with us. A focused touch-up to keep that fresh finish going — quick, thorough, and no-fuss.

⚠ Must have had a prior detail with us. Must be booked within 1 month of your last detail.
$150 / vehicle

The Difference

Why Choose Bay Area Auto Care

We're not a drive-through car wash. We're a detail-obsessed team that comes to you, uses premium products, and won't leave until the job is done right.

🚗
We Come to You
Mobile service means zero trips, zero waiting. We show up at your home, office, across San Francisco and South San Francisco with everything we need.
✨
Pro-Grade Products
We use professional-grade, paint-safe products — no harsh chemicals, no shortcuts. The kind of products used at high-end dealerships and body shops.
⏱️
Same-Day Availability
Need it done today? We frequently have same-day slots open. Reach out and we'll make it happen.
🔒
Satisfaction Guaranteed
If you're not happy, we'll come back and fix it. Every time. Your satisfaction isn't optional — it's the whole point.
📍
Bay Area Locals
We live and work here. We serve San Francisco and South San Francisco — and for locations across the Bay Bridge, a $35 travel fee applies.
💬
Quote Within the Hour
No games, no delays. Send us your vehicle info and we'll get back to you with a custom quote in under 60 minutes.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes — we're fully mobile. We come to your home, workplace, or wherever your car is parked in the San Francisco Bay Area. Just bring access to a nearby water hookup if possible (we carry our own supply for most jobs).
It depends on the package and vehicle size. A Maintenance Detail typically takes 1–2 hours. A Full Detail can run 3–5 hours for larger vehicles. We'll give you a time estimate when we confirm your booking.
We primarily serve San Francisco and South San Francisco. For clients located across the Bay Bridge, a $35 travel fee is added to your service. Not sure if we cover your area? Just reach out and we'll let you know!
We accept cash, Venmo, Zelle, and all major credit cards. Payment is collected after the service is complete and you've had a chance to inspect the work.
We typically have availability within the week. Call or text us at 415-717-9895 for the fastest response, or fill out the contact form and we'll get back to you within hours.
Absolutely. We detail all vehicle types — sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans, and luxury vehicles. Pricing may vary slightly for larger vehicles; mention your car type when you reach out and we'll give you an accurate quote.
We stand behind our work 100%. If there's anything you're not satisfied with, let us know before we leave and we'll address it on the spot. Your satisfaction is our standard, not an afterthought.
